query_text: Plan a 3-day trip for 3 people from Las Vegas to Anchorage from November 21st to November 23rd, 2024, with a budget of $6,600. Accommodations should allow visitors as per the house rules.

properties.name: The Tanglewood House • Bright + Cozy -Near Airport
properties.title: Home in Anchorage

properties.description: Get out of the city and deeper into the Alaskan wilderness than is typical on a sightseeing tour. This tour takes you to Chugach National Forest, Beluga Point, Portage Glacier, and more to spot brown bears, wolves, bison, and belugas. Enjoy live commentary and learn about the unique landscapes of Alaska from your expert guide.
properties.localName: 11 am Wilderness, Wildlife, Glacier Experience from Anchorage
properties.name: 11 am Wilderness, Wildlife, Glacier Experience from Anchorage

properties.description: Comfortable, luxury coaches at affordable rates for your Seward to Anchorage transfer, Whittier to Anchorage shuttle, or Anchorage to Seward bus, Anchorage to Whittier transportation. 100% satisfaction, BBB accredited.Why choose us? Equipment, Equipment, Equipment. We are the only company in the area to use modern, coach style buses with restroom on board - we don’t waste customers’ time to stop for ”out houses” on our way, we give you more time to enjoy scenery and not on waiting in line for restroom. We show you more with less time than other companies. Don’t be sorry you did not book with us when you see another guy’s bus.Add a little scenery to your transfer. With a little extra time you will be able to get out of the bus and appreciate the scenic drive with photos and memories to last for lifetime. Our Wildlife Transfer is the best value on a market and our most popular transfer, featuring photo stops and a visit to Alaska Wildlife Conservation Center where you are guaranteed to see some Alaskan animals such as bears, moose, caribou, musk oxen, and wood bison.Our company offers a short tour/transfer that makes a stop at the Wildlife Conservation Center (included in the price) Portage Glacier Lake, and Beluga Point, and a narration on the way to Whittier or to Anchorage and a drive thru tour of Anchorage.Anchorage to Whittier And Whittier to Anchorage Shuttle Bus tour/transfer is directly coordinated with the cruise line schedule and place. We will meet you when you are able to get off the ship, will take care of your luggage, and drop off at most locations in Anchorage. Or we will pick you up at most locations in Anchorage, will take care of your luggage, and we GUARANTEE to deliver you to your cruise ship right on time for your departure.We charter buses for private group tours and transfers.
properties.name: Alaska Cruise Transportation - ACT

properties.description: Take a flight our float planes to the real Alaska whether flight seeing glaciers and mountains, bear viewing at remote lodges and national parks or fly in fishing. We've been flying people to Alaska's wilderness since 1963; located at Lake Hood in Anchorage, Alaska.
properties.name: Rust's Flying Service

properties.description: The Alaska Travel Experts for 25 years, Alaska Tour & Travel specializes in custom vacations to Alaska’s most spectacular destinations. Our knowledgeable Alaskan staff is here to help you plan your ideal Alaska land package. You can choose one of our popular pre-built trips, or customize your own based on your budget, timeline, and interests. Want to spend extra days in Denali or swing through Seward? Easy! Prefer travel by train over car? Done! This is Alaska travel your way. Offering you great value, quality products, and the most convenient way to plan your Alaska vacation. Visit our website or give us a call today!
properties.name: Alaska Tour & Travel

properties.description: Hop aboard a red trolley in downtown Anchorage during this deluxe city tour, focused on local culture and history. See top landmarks including Earthquake Park, Lake Hood Harbor, and the Alaska Railroad Depot. Get off the trolley at designated photo stops and ask your guide questions to learn more. Watch seaplanes land on Lake Hood and keep an eye out for wildlife like moose during the tour.
properties.name: Anchorage Trolley's Deluxe City Tour

properties.description: Alaska Pablo's Bicycle Rentals has been serving the great community of Anchorage and its visitors since 2002, we know bicycles and we have the best location in town situated at ONLY one block away from the world's famous Tony Knowles Coastal Trail and within walking distance from just about every hotel, restaurant, and shopping district. We have at your convenience a wide array of only high-end bicycles, as well as, an exceptional customer service.
properties.name: Pablo Bicycle Rentals

properties.description: SALMON BERRY TRAVEL & TOURS offers Locally Guided Small Group or Private Day Tours and Multi-Day Adventures! We can help you #FindYourAlaska
properties.name: Salmon Berry Travel & Tours

properties.name: Chugach State Park

properties.description: The Wilderness Express Rail is a privately owned fleet of luxury dome railcars that operate on the end of the Alaska Railroad train service between Anchorage, Talkeetna, Denali National Park and Fairbanks. Enjoy unsurpassed 360 degree views from your reserved seat in the upper level dome, take in the scenery from the outdoor viewing platform, or dine in style in the lower level private restaurant.
properties.name: Wilderness Express Train

properties.description: Come join us on a Segway Tour of Anchorage! Take a tour around Downtown Anchorage, watch the salmon spawn in Ship Creek, take in views of the Cook Inlet and the Alaska Range, and ride through history at the Alaska Statehood Monument and the historic Alaska Railroad terminal. Segway Tours of Anchorage provides an approximately 90 minute guided tour of Downtown Anchorage on a Segway, the gyroscopically enhanced Personal Transporter. Learning to ride a Segway is simple and fun for the whole family! Before we start the tour, your guide will lead you through an orientation and training of riding a Segway! Some of the sites you may see during the tour include: Stops to view King Salmon and Silver Salmon returning from the ocean to spawn at Ship Creek. A view of the Cook Inlet, the Alaska Range, Mt McKinley and Mount Susitna at Resolution Park. The Alaska Statehood Monument with views of Anchorage’s original town site The historic Alaska Railroad Terminal. Town Square in the heart of downtown with its fabulous flower displays. Westchester Lagoon and the multitudes of migratory bird inhabitants. The Delaney Park Strip and Centenial Rose Garden. The Tony Knowles Coastal Trail. "Star The Reindeer," our local resident and mascot. And Yes, she is a real reindeer! Don't miss out on this great, fun-filled experience in Anchorage!
properties.name: Segway Tours of Anchorage

properties.name: Wild Scoops
properties.description: Wild Scoops handcrafts small batches of ice cream in flavors that are local, adventurous, and wildly delicious. It's a celebration of Alaskan ingredients, starring products from local forests, gardens, and vendors. We concoct and churn each batch right here in Anchorage, inspired by our surrounds or our travels. Our small and cozy scoop shop opened in downtown Anchorage in summer 2017. Our Midtown Scoop Shop (next to our Test Kitchen) is at 530 E Benson Blvd!
properties.address: 530 E Benson Blvd The Metro Mall, Anchorage, AK 99503

properties.name: Glacier Brewhouse
properties.description: You will know the moment you walk in that this is not your typical brew pub. The scent of the alder wood grill and wood fired oven, the energy of the sparking exhibition cooking line and the glow of the brewery delight your senses. The BrewHouse features rotisserie grilled meats, the seafood from ocean to table, wood fired pizza and award winning hand crafted brews. Our friendly, energetic wait staff also offer gluten free, Keto and vegetarian options. Join us for brunch on the weekend, and bring the whole family anytime. The BrewHouse is Anchorage’s downtown landmark restaurant-“Where Alaskans meet Alaskans”. We appreciate your feedback, please let us know how we performed. Thank you, we hope to see you soon.

properties.name: Snow City Cafe
properties.description: Sunny side up since 1998! We're a popular downtown brunch spot where the staff is friendly, the food is tasty, and breakfast is served all day. Our mission is to use the freshest ingredients available and buy from local vendors whenever we can. Most everything we serve is made from scratch, and with plenty of love. We care about good food, our community, the environment, and making people happy. We offer a variety of vegan & gluten-free options, as well as a range of healthy choices. Come check us out, and see why Anchorage locals vote us "Best Breakfast" year after year. We don't take reservations, but you can join our same-day waitlist online.

properties.description: Known by the locals simply as "Simon's" this Anchorage landmark has beautiful panoramic views overlooking Cook Inlet, Mount Susitna and the Alaska Range. This classic American grill has been artfully serving quality USDA prime-aged steak, fresh and innovative seafood since 1978. Enjoy a daily lunch, dinner, weekend brunch, or perhaps a special business or romantic occasion in our warm, inviting and spacious dining room. Join our longtime friends and frequent visitors who have enjoyed many fond memories over the years as our guests.

properties.name: 49th State Brewing - Anchorage
properties.description: At 49th State Brewing - Anchorage, the cultural layers of Alaska unfold around you. Here, you can delve into the long tradition of brewing with our award winning beer, explore a menu filled with freshly sourced Alaskan products, or relax on the rooftop patio overlooking the Cook Inlet and Alaska Range. With an environment welcoming to locals and tourists alike, there's something for everyone.

properties.name: Orso
properties.description: An elegant and rich, yet relaxed, atmosphere with cuisine to match. Our friendly and well-trained service team is waiting to pair the perfect wine with a dish of Alaska seafood, grilled meats, or house made desserts prepared daily by our culinary team. Our bartenders are ready to mix up top shelf cocktails, flights of local Alaska spirits or pour a pint of Glacier BrewHouse ale. Join us for an evening hour or late night drinks.
